title: anemone pulsatilla subsp. montana
intro: Anemone pulsatilla subsp. montana, commonly known as pulsatilla or pasque flower, is a perennial plant species native to mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Anemone pulsatilla subsp. montana include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant include dried root and flower infusions, as well as tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
